title: Services Brazilians often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Document legalisation guides, planning tools, international transfers, housing, insurance, and mobile—useful alongside MVV and residence permit steps.

items.reason: Map apostille and legalisation when Brazilian documents feed into IND or gemeente procedures.
Plan sworn translations when authorities request Dutch or English versions.
Organise your document pack before MVV submission or registration.
Build a phased checklist with ?from=brazil context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance after you land.
Move BRL and EUR with transparent pricing while you coordinate deposits and rent.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
